full_text:
Xiahou Lan 夏侯蘭
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xiahou Lan (夏侯蘭). An acquittance of Zhao Yun from childhood, he surrendered and became an officer of military law. Xiahou Lan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Shu Kingdom.
